name: agent-canvas-x
description: Agent Canvas X - A VS Code extension
author: maddada

agentCanvasX.autoAlignWidthValue.description: Default tile width used by auto-align. Combine with the width unit to use either fixed pixels or viewport width.

agentCanvasX.autoAlignWidthUnit.description: Unit used for the auto-align tile width.

agentCanvasX.autoAlignHeightValue.description: Default tile height used by auto-align. Combine with the height unit to use either fixed pixels or viewport height.

agentCanvasX.autoAlignHeightUnit.description: Unit used for the auto-align tile height.

agentCanvasX.terminalNavigationWrap.description: Whether Ctrl+Shift terminal navigation wraps around the opposite edge when there is no tile in the chosen direction.

agentCanvasX.uiScale.description: Scales the canvas UI chrome such as the toolbar, inspector, dialogs, and empty states.

agentCanvasX.themeMode.description: Controls the Agent Canvas X webview appearance mode.

agentCanvasX.panMode.description: Controls whether canvas panning stays fully free or biases toward centering the nearest tile.

agentCanvasX.panSnapHysteresis.description: How much sticky mode resists switching to a different nearby tile while panning.

agentCanvasX.panSnapStrength.description: How strongly sticky pan mode pulls the nearest visible tile toward the viewport center.

agentCanvasX.panSnapRadius.description: How close a tile must be to the viewport center before sticky pan mode starts attracting it.

agentCanvasX.panSnapSettleStrength.description: How strongly sticky mode recenters the chosen tile after panning stops.

agentCanvasX.panSnapSettleDelay.description: How long sticky mode waits before applying its settle recenter after panning stops.

agentCanvasX.terminalActiveMaxFps.description: Maximum render FPS for the focused terminal tile. Set to 0 to disable the cap.

agentCanvasX.terminalActiveWriteBatchInt.description: How long terminal output waits before flushing into the focused terminal tile. Set to 0 for immediate writes.

agentCanvasX.terminalVisibleMaxFps.description: Maximum render FPS for visible terminal tiles that are not focused. Set to 0 to disable the cap.

agentCanvasX.terminalVisibleWriteBatchIn.description: How long terminal output waits before flushing into visible terminal tiles that are not focused. Set to 0 for immediate writes.

agentCanvasX.terminalOffscreenMaxFps.description: Maximum render FPS for off-screen terminal tiles. Set to 0 to disable the cap.

agentCanvasX.terminalOffscreenWriteBatch.description: How long terminal output waits before flushing into off-screen terminal tiles. Set to 0 for immediate writes.

agentCanvasX.terminalFontFamily.default: "MesloLGL Nerd Font Mono", "MesloLGS NF", "SF Mono", SFMono-Regular, ui-monospace, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace
agentCanvasX.terminalFontFamily.description: Font family stack used by Agent Canvas X terminal tiles. Set this to a Nerd Font installed on your system.
